message:
Add schema version uniqueness tests, native addon enum validation, and modern Rust pattern refactoring

Schema Validation (5 modules):
- lowering_parity_evidence: schema uniqueness tests + verdict computation tests
- persistent_cache_contract: schema uniqueness, serde round-trips, cache key material validation
- seqlock_rollout_guard: schema version, verdict labels, policy lookup, serde round-trips
- ts_normalization_evidence: schema uniqueness, enum serde round-trips, contract satisfaction logic
- zero_placeholder_scan: schema uniqueness, scan event serde, finding serde, bead ID fallback

Native Addon Tests:
- Comprehensive enum as_str/Display round-trip tests for all NativeAddon* variants
  (AbiSurface, Cohort, FallbackMode, Route, SupportStatus, HandleDiscipline,
  SymbolClass, InvocationChannel) ensuring unique string representations

Modern Rust Patterns (Rust 1.80+):
- Refactor nested if-let + if to let...&& guard patterns in regime_signature_feature,
  module_async_evaluation, stdlib (UTF-16 surrogate pair detection), and
  ts_module_resolution (simplified export target selection with ? operator)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
